channel.title: Admin Only on VitaminDWiki
channel.description: Recent content in Admin Only on VitaminDWiki

item.title: 10 minutes
item.description:
5-10 minutes of sun provides ONLY 1,000 IU ONLY IF

  • you are near the equator

  • AND young (seniors 4X longer)

  • AND not obese ( need 3X longer)

  • AND have light skin (Dark Skin need 4X longer)

  • AND it is summer

  • AND it is the middle of the day

  • AND you have lots of skin exposed to the sun

  • AND you are lying down

  • AND you are not wearing sunscreen

item.title: After reaching Vitamin D plateau we need to evaluate response
item.description:
Expecting to give 50,000 IU of Vitamin D weekly (or 7,000 IU) daily to many adults,

    along with some Magnesium and Vitamin K2-7

After the response has plateaued (1 month with loading dose, 3 months otherwise)

everyone should get a vitamin D test to determin if any change is needed
__Test results % Possible reasons for the result Possible actions__
<40 ng
(<100 nmol/L)		 32% Senior, Autistic, Smoker, Obese, slow responder
taking statins, low magnesium, bariatric surgery,
Poor health (consuming vitamin D)
POOR: liver, genes, gut, pancreas, gall bladder		 1) larger dose of Vitamin D,
2) gut-friendly vitamin D,
3) probiotics
4) wait for slow responder
40 ng-120 ng
(100-300 nmol/L)		 60% Right on target no change needed if feel benefit
40 ng-120 ng
(100-300 nmol/L)		 5% on target, but not feel any benefit
Vitamin D probably not getting to cell		 Activate Vitamin D receptor
    (weekly dosing, Resveratrol, etc.)
What to do if Poor Kidney, 3 other genes
>120 ng
(>300 nmol/L)		 3% Excessive response
Genes, drugs being taken		 Reduce Vitamin D dose - perhaps by 50%
>200 ng
(500 nmol)		 1% Dangerous response Should person stop taking Vitamin D
Might daily be better for that person?

References

item.title: Test of count of items in deficiency category
FAQ for Large Vitamin D Trial
item.description:
Want to add many FAQ items, such as

  • pill boxes are provided - easily see if have taking the pill for the day

    • people who dislike taking pills can get a liquid form

  • participants can choose to be contacted more or less frequently

  • possible blood test 3 months in

      • might alter the form or amount of vitamin D.

  • change of dose based on weight, etc

  • NOT a randomized controlled trial - all participants get the benefit, not just half

item.title: Vitamin D once a week, Mg on other days
item.description:
First cut at monthly dosing

Normal weight Adult
Sun Mon Tue Thur Fri Sat
D50 Mg Mg Mg Mg Mg
D50 Mg Mg Mg Mg Mg
D50 Mg Mg Mg Mg Mg
D50 Mg Mg Mg Mg Mg

Obese Adult
Sun Mon Tue Thur Fri Sat
D50 D50 Mg Mg Mg Mg Mg
D50 D50 Mg Mg Mg Mg Mg
D50 D50 Mg Mg Mg Mg Mg
D50 D50 Mg Mg Mg Mg Mg

10 year old

item.title: Magnesium tests
item.description:
Grassroots Health

Blog Post March 2022

Serum Magnesium

Serum is the clear, liquid part of blood, which does not include the red and white blood cells, platelets, and clotting proteins found in whole blood. While serum magnesium is the most widely used measurement for magnesium status (often used in doctors’ and medical offices), it has been recognized as unreliable for diagnosing most cases of magnesium deficiency, especially chronic or subclinical deficiency. Many studies have found a correlation between low magnesium intake and increased risk of disease, however, this relationship often does not correlate with serum magnesium levels.

item.title: Lists of specific words in VitaminDWiki titles
Keep Vitamin D on-hand for emergencies
item.description:
Health Problem Have on-hand
Serious Allergic Reaction EpiPen
Angina Nitroglycerin
Asthma Inhaler
Pain, Headache Aspirin.
Inflammation NASIDs
Malaria Quinine
Indigestion Petobismol. Tums
Constipation Miralax,
Diarrhea Imodium, Kaopectate
Minor Bleeding Band Aides
((Overview Colds and flu and Vitamin D Colds and Flu))
Trauma and surgery
Pneumonia
((Sepsis is both prevented and treated by Vitamin D - many studies

Best guess: 200,000 IU of vitamin D in a single day to rejuvinate immune system

item.title: Employers gain 10 dollars in productivity for every dollar spent on giving Vitamin D for free
item.description:
• Cost of losing 10 minutes of productivy a day = $1,600/year
      • Several health problems each reduce productivity by 10 minutes per day ($1,600/year)
      • Pain reduces productivity by 10 days / year ($4,000/year)
      • Elements of the plan

Cost of losing 10 minutes of productivy a day = $1,600/year

Median US employee costs $50/hour

= Salary + Health Benefits + Social Security (FICA) + Adminstrative support + Retirement + Vacation + Workers compensation + Bonus + Sick leave + Office space (~$5,000/year)

item.title: Increased Vitamin D results in increased health
item.description:
Unwrapping an onion

Want to use terms that everyone understands

Hope to use this for Vitamin D in general, but might focus just on viruses and COVID-19

Increased Vitamin D ==> More Health

Increased Vitamin D ==> Prevent and Treat Health problems.

More D: Prevent Health problems enhancing the Innate immune system

More D: Prevent Health problems by normalizing Calcium ( PTH) - Rickets. Weak bones, Osteoporosis

More D: Prevent Health problems by normalizing blood pressure (renin angiotensin system )

item.title: A health immune system is very good at dealing with viral variants
Spanish landing page test
item.description:
Hope to make this page automatically be displayed in Spanish

This would become a landing page for Google Adwords advertising in Spanish

One of the items on the page would be the Spanish version of Does Less Sun Mean More Disease

Hopefully the Spanish translation would continue when the person visits other pages

Note: Considering making a new annimation in English in 2021 which would also have versions with text and voice in ohter languages: Spanish, Chinese, etc.

item.title: FADE test
item.description:
{FADE(label=“CLICK HERE to see the scientific proof for each health problem”)}

Multiple Sclerosis

  • Multiple Sclerosis relapses cut in half by 100,000 IU of Vitamin D every 2 weeks– RCT 2019

PMS

  • PMS again significantly reduced by 50,000 IU of vitamin D (This time, every two weeks) – RCT Oct 2019

Schizophrenia

  • Schizophrenia reduced by biweekly 50,000 IU Vitamin D and probiotics – RCT Feb 2019

Endometriosis

  • Endometriosis treated by Vitamin D (50,000 IU bi-weekly) – RCT Jan 2021

Note - Magnesium and Omega-3 supplementation often provide similar benefits for the above health problems

item.title: Vitamin D Help Us Fight Infections - interview of Dr. Thakkar (transcript)
item.description:
Youtube - audio only (transcript below)

Dr Vatsal Thakkar

He is one of the 200+ signers of the open letter: Vitamin D combats COVID-19

Dr. Thakkar takes 10,000 IU daily website [www.vatsalthakkar.com]

A fraction of the signers take >4,000 IU daily

24 slides - which nicely support this podcast

Paradocs podcast note for this episode

Transcript

[music]

Introduction

0:00:08.6 Welcome to The Paradocs with your attending, Doctor Eric Larson . He is a practicing anesthesiologist and clinical assistant professor at Michigan State University College of Human Medicine. Listen in as he takes you behind the scenes of what practicing medicine in today’s ever-changing world is like with another doctor. The Paradocs is a fun and accidentally informative show for physicians, patients, or anyone who has ever found themselves in a waiting room.

item.title: Vitamin D sales up 40 percent in Dec
item.description:
Vitamin D sales are up. But experts still don’t know whether it can prevent or treat covid Washington Post Jan 11, 2021

“According to Nielsen data from December, sales for vitamin D supplements increased 41.5 percent year over year. "

Sales of vitamin D supplements up 3000% after Public Health England recommendation May 2020

Many clinical trials are underway which are testing Vitamin D to fight COVID-19

item.title: Test of header font sizes
item.description:
1 quick brown fox

2 quick brown foxes

3 quick brown foxes

4 quick brown foxes

5 quick brown foxes
6 quick brown foxes

standard size bold foxes

FONT plugin 17px no effect

  • AAAAAAAAAAA

  • BBBBBBBBBBB

  • CCCCCCCCCC

DIV plugin 17px ok

  • AAAAAAAAAAA

  • BBBBBBBBBBB

  • CCCCCCCCCC

item.title: Garth statement
item.description:
My tips for medical researchers:

1. publish raw data so anyone can reanalyze it if they don't agree with the stats.

2. publish preprints and embrace open science

3. work with trained experimental scientists if you/they are not your/themselves (e.g. doctors or nutritionists doing science) forming multidisciplinary coalitions as the quality benefits are massive from these collaborations.

4A. Never ever ever use a p-value again. (They don't mean what people think they do. They've done way more harm than good. They're an awful statistic and should be banned.)

item.title: NFL notes
item.description:
20% False Negative test result (you actually have COVID-19 but test results says no) Science Daily May 26

67% on Day 4, 20% on Day 8, 21% on Day 9, 66% on Day 21 - review of 7 False Negative studies

Note: COVID-19 patients typically not released until no symptoms and test negative twice

https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2020/05/200526173832.htm

How many days after exposure should one be tested to yield the most accurate results, and with which test?

item.title: We need data on COVID-19 prevention by Vitamin D
item.description:
Most of the world wants to prevent COVID-19 (not just treat it)

The immune system can prevent many infections by:

  1. Injecting a vaccine which causes it to create COVID-19 antibodies

      Expensive COVID-19 vaccines might become available in in early 2021

  • Unsure if the vaccines will work and have few side effects

  • Unsure if the vaccine created antibodies will last a long time

  • Unsure if the antibodies will be appropriate for continued COVID-19 muttations

item.title: Proposed Coronavirus Clinical Trials using a Megadose of Vitamin D
item.description:
The healthier an immune system is, the better it is able to fight off attacks.

      both prevention and treatment

There are many ways to fortify the immune system in 2 to 3 months.

A few of the ways provide both prevention and treatment

A megadose of Vitamin D appears to be the only way to provide both prevention and treatment in days

I would like to test two COVID-19 hypotheses and use any positive results this October.

item.title: Could the Coronavirus be stopped by Vitamin D
Viruses and Vitamin D
item.description:
Type of Virus Associated with low Vitamin D Treated by Vitamin D
Cold Virus 12% more likely for each 10 ng less Vit D Reduced by half if 20,000 IU weekly
Influenza Virus Far less risk if >30 ng of Vit D Treated by single 50.000 IU dose
2X less child risk if 1200 IU
Enveloped Virus Dengue 8X higher risk       Measles
50% more likely to get enveloped virus
   infection if poor Vitamin D Receptor Hepatitis C   Hepatitis B
HIV   Shingles
Pneumonia - viral 6X higher risk 17X reduction with 200,000 IU

item.title: Vit D drop, need, how go get
item.description:
Vitamin D allows your body to fight 100+ health problems

#F00:85 health problems proven to be treated/prevented by Vitamin D

#F00:22 health problems proven to be treated by just a single Vitamin D pill #090:every 2 weeks

item.title: Test the find function
item.description:
Vitamin D prevents or treats 88 health problems

Surf to   is.gd/proofvitd   for updates or details

Select pink box in the upper right to select a language

Click on ===underlined=== items for details

Dec 2016 PDFs of this page (with 75 proofs) in

Engish  German  Dutch  French  Norwegian  Chinese   Polish  Ukranian
Health Problem T reat
P revent		 Reduction by Vit D RCT = Randomized Controlled Trial
   * = link to additional RCT
CT = Clinical Trial
Hypertension T
P 		149 to 142 mm Hg
HT risk reduced 10X		 RCT   , 2400 IU.  ((Arterial stiffness reduced by a single dose of 100,000 IU of vitamin D – RCT Dec 2014
Cardiovascular after attack T 32 % fewer deaths CT 1000 IU
((Diabetes 1. T1_Diabetes Diabetes Type 1)) P
Diabetes Type 2 T 62 % RCT ✻ CRP reduction, 4000 IU
__((Vitamin D injection is far better than oral for diabetics (poor gut) – RCT March 2017
Back Pain T [95 %
reduced 50%](https://www.VitaminDWiki.com/tiki-download_file.php?fileId=1348) 5000/10000 IU
60,000 IU weekly
Influenza P 90 % RCT ((Influenza A: 5X reduction in first month (only) with 2,000 IU of vitamin D– RCT July 2014
Falls P 50% RCT , 100,000 IU monthly
((Falls cut in half by 100,000 IU vitamin D monthly - RCT 2016
Hip Fractures P 30 % RCT ✻ 800 IU
Rickets P 98 % Turkey, 400 IU NOT RCT, given to all children
Raynaud’s Syndrome T 40 % RCT , visual scale, 20000 IU Avg
Menstrual pain P 76 % RCT , 7000 IU Avg,
((PMS in teens reduced 3X by 50,000 IU vitamin D weekly – Jan 2018
Pregnancy risks P 50 % RCT , 4000 IU
C-section, unplanned P 50 % RCT , 4000 IU, small study
Low birth weight P 60 % RCT ✻ 1000 IU of D2
TB P 60 % RCT , 800 IU
Breast Cancer P [Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=931] RCT , 1100 IU (2007)
Rheumatoid Arthritis pain T 40 % RCT , 500 IU, added to prescription
Cystic Fibrosis T 75 %
((Cystic fibrosis treatment by vitamin D improved quality of life and breathing (8200 IU daily)– RCT Dec 2016		 2nd study improved))
Chronic Kidney T 90 to 70 PTH RCT , 3500 IU,
Respiratory Tract Infection P 63 % 3 RCT , 4000 IU 1 year ((Respiratory Tract Infection visits 2.5 less likely with vitamin D: Pregnancy 2000 IU, Infant 800 IU – RCT Oct 2014
[tiki-browse_categories. PHP? parentId=31&sort_mode=created_desc] T
T 		[Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=3285]
((Musculoskeletal pain reduced with 4,000 IU of vitamin D – RCT April 2015		 Pain reduced))
Sickle Cell T Less pain
 RCT , up to 100,000 IU/week
Leg ulcer healing T 4X faster RCT , 50,0000 IU/week, small study
Traumatic Brain Injury T [Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=3640] RCT , 20,0000 IU/day with progesterone
Parkinson’s Disease T Stabilized RCT , 1200 IU/day
Multiple Sclerosis P
T 		68%
[Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=5279]		 RCT , 7100 IU prevent pre-MS ==> MS
20,000 to 140,000 IU/day
Congestive Heart Failure T [Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=2441] RCT , 1000 IU infants ([Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=4138])
Middle Ear Infection P [Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=4133] RCT , 1000 IU infants
Gingivitis T 88 % RCT , 2000 IU
[Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=28] T [Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=4645] RCT , 4000 IU
Antibiotic use when >70y T [Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=4646] RCT , 60,000 IU monthly
((Infant-Child Infants)) taller Benefit [Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=4668]
((Gestational Diabetes reduce 3 times by 5,000 IU of Vitamin D – RCT Jan 2016 Gestational Diabetes)) T [Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=4676]
After Heart Attack T [Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=4695] RCT , 800,000 IU one time
[tiki-browse_categories. PHP? parentId=43&sort_mode=created_desc] T [Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=2989] RCT , 4000 IU (2012)
Asthma P   T [Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=4745] RCT , 60K IU/month;
RCT ((Asthma reduced by weekly 50,000 IU of vitamin D – RCT Aug
[tiki-browse_categories. PHP? parentId=43&sort_mode=created_desc] T [Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=4757] RCT 300,000 IU injection
RCT ((Just 1500 IU of Vitamin D significantly helps Prozac – RCT March 2013
[tiki-browse_categories. PHP? parentId=109&sort_mode=created_desc] P [Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=4845] RCT , 5,000 IU
[Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=383] T [Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=5005] RCT , 30-48 ng
RCT ((Fibromyalgia pain with trazodone reduced by 50 percent with weekly 50,000 IU of vitamin D – RCT Nov 2014
Hives, Chronic T [Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=5053] RCT , 4000 IU added
Cholesterol T Reduced 4 mg RCT , 400 IU + Ca
Weight Loss T [Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=5166] RCT , 2000 IU +diet +exercise
Gestational Diabetes P 40% RCT * , 5,000 IU
[Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=5151] T [Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=4724] CT, 50,000 IU weekly
((100000 IU vitamin D monthly helps COPD patients – 3 RCT
[Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=1433] T [Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=5393] RCT >42 mg of vitamin D
[Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=3924] T [Tiki-index. PHP? page_id=5387] CT, 4,000 IU in daily bread
Death of Critically Ill
Patients		 T ((Vitamin D intervention increased by 20 percent the survival of critically ill patients- RCT June 2014 20% increase in survivability))
((Restless legs syndrome 5X more likely if low vitamin D – May 2014 Restless Leg Syndrome)) T ((Restless Legs Syndrome dramatically reduced by vitamin D, etc
Hepatitis-C T ((Vitamin D prevents Hepatitis-C and helps treat it (many studies) Aided normal drugs))
((Overview Gut and vitamin D Crohn’s disease)) T ((Crohn’s disease helped when vitamin D level raised above 30 ng – RCT Feb 2015
((Pregnancy Pre-term birth)) P ((Improved births with 2,000 IU vitamin D during pregnancy in India - RCT Feb 2015
((Cluster headaches virtually eliminated in 7,000 people with high-dose vitamin D and cofactors - Feb 2022 Cluster headaches)) T ((Cluster headaches virtually eliminated in 7,000 people with high-dose vitamin D and cofactors - Feb 2022
((Overview Autism and vitamin D Autism)) T ((Autism decreased in 8 out of 10 children supplemented with vitamin D – April 2015
((Overview Diabetes and vitamin D PreDiabetes)) T ((Prediabetes reduced by monthly 60,000 IU of vitamin D – RCT May 2015
((Overview Obesity and Vitamin D Weight loss:
Overweight and Obese))		 T ((Overweight and obese lost 12 lbs with vitamin D in 6 months– RCT May 2015
((Sarcopenia (muscle loss) fought by Vitamin D, exercise and protein - many studies Sarcopenia = muscle loss )) T ((Improved muscle function in postmenopausal women with just 1,000 IU of vitamin D daily – RCT May 2015
Growing Pains T ((Growing pains reduced 60 percent by monthly Vitamin D – March 2014 60% decrease))
((Overview Osteoarthritis and Vitamin D Osteoarthritis pain)) T ((Knee osteoarthritis treated with vitamin D, weekly 50,000 IU – May 2015
((ALS fought by vitamin D - many studies ALS)) T ((ALS fought by vitamin D - many studies
Vertigo T ((Common cause of dizziness (BPPV) reduced 5 X by several doses of 50,000 IU of vitamin D – 2015, 2016 3X reduction)) if raised > 10ng
Warts T ((Warts eliminated by vitamin D injections 80% eliminated)) injection
((Overview Metabolic Syndrome and vitamin D Metabolic Syndrome)) P ((Metabolic Syndrome risk reduced 44 percent when vitamin D levels increased by 30 nanograms – Aug 2015
Hay fever P ((Allergic Rhinitis (hay fever) reduced by just 1,000 IU of vitamin D for 30 days – RCT Sept 2015 reduced 48%))
Preeclampsia P ((Preeclampsia reduced by Vitamin D (50,000 IU bi-weekly) and Calcium – Oct 2015 Recurrance cut in half))
((Preeclampsia risk reduced by higher levels of vitamin D (VDAART 4,400 IU) - RCT Nov 2016
Blood cell cancer
((Multiple Myeloma (blood cell cancer) treated by vitamin D - many studies		 Multiple Myeloma)) T Survival 90% vs 50%
((Overview Gut and vitamin D Irritable Bowel Syndrome)) T ((IBS – 82 percent had low vitamin D, 3,000 IU spray helped a lot – RCT Dec 2015
((UTI associated with low Vitamin D as well as treated - many studies Urinary Tract Infection)) P 50% reduction
Mite Allergy P ((Five times less mite allergy when vitamin D added in mid pregnancy and to infant – RCT April 2016 5X reduction))
Perinatal depression
(depression near birth)		 T ((Perinatal depression decreased 40 percent with just a few weeks of 2,000 IU of vitamin D – RCT Aug 2016 50% reduction))
((Bacterial vaginosis reduced 10 times by 2,000 IU of vitamin D – RCT June 2015 Vaginosis)) T 10X reduction
((Eczema (Atopic Dermatitis) treated by 1600 IU of vitamin D – meta-analysis Dec 2016 Eczema)) T Reduced
((Non-Alcoholic Fatty Liver Disease (NAFLD) treated by Vitamin D (20,000 IU weekly after loading dose) – RCT June 2016 Non-Alcoholic
Fatty Liver Disease))		 T Reduced
((Knee osteoarthritis pain reduced by 60,000 IU monthly vitamin D following loading dose – RCT Nov 2013 Knee Osteoartiritis)) T Pain Reduced
((Tuberculosis recovery speeded up by single 450,000 IU dose of vitamin D – RCT Jan 2017 Tuberculosis)) T Faster Recovery
((Better outcome following Ischemic stroke if injected with 600,000 IU of vitamin D – RCT Feb 2017 Stroke - Ischemic)) T Faster Recovery
((Sepsis is both prevented and treated by Vitamin D - many studies Sepsis)) T Reduce ICU and Hospital
length of stay by 7 days each
Trauma deaths T ((Vitamin D and Glutamine reduced Trauma Center deaths by half – March 2017 50% fewer deaths))
Hemodialysis patients T ((Hemodialysis patients (CKD) helped by weekly 50,000 IU of vitamin D – Jan 2017 helped))
Fatty liver - child T ((NAFLD in children nicely treated by combination of Vitamin D and Omega-3 – RCT Dec 2016 2 X reduction))
Fatigue T ((Fatigue reduced by a single dose of vitamin D (100,000 IU) – RCT Dec 2016 Reduced))
((Sleep Sleep Disorders)) T ((Sleeps disorders nicely treated by Vitamin D (50,000 IU twice a month) – RCT May 2017
Pneumonia
(Ventilator-associated)		 T ((Ventilator-associated pneumonia death rate cut in half by Vitamin D injection (300,000 IU) – RCT July 2017 RCT   Death rate cut in half))
((Fertility and sperm Infertile males)) T ((Birth rates doubled with Vitamin D - 300,000 for infertile men – RCT Nov 2017
Waist size T ((Waist size reduced 3 cm by Vitamin D in those with Metabolic Syndrome – Jan 2017 Waist size reduced 3 cm))
((ADHD and Vitamin D Deficiency Attention Deficient
Hyperactivity Disorder))		 T ((ADHD reduced by just 3,000 IU of Vitamin D and methylphenidate for just 12 weeks – RCT Feb 2018
((Alcoholic liver cirrhosis treated by 1,000 IU of vitamin D – July 2018 Alcoholic liver cirrhosis)) T improved survival
((Diabetic nephropathy (Kidney) treated by 50,000 IU of vitamin D weekly – RCT Jan 2019 Diabetic nephropathy)) T Reduced HOMA-IR, FRS
((Ulcerative Colitis significantly reduced by 480,000 IU loading dose of nano Vitamin D – RCT July 2019 Ulcerative Colitis)) T Reduced 60%
Obese weight loss T Lost 3X more pounds $10 of Vitamin D added to
  calorie restriction & walking

Most proofs are RCT (Randomized Controlled Trials), where not even the doctor knows who gets the extra vitamin D

item.title: Test code vs custom Search
item.description:
Diabetes and Meta-Analysis: Merged Code and CS (Custom Search) results, then sorted by Title

Vitamin D treats Gestational Diabetes, decreases hospitalization and newborn complications – meta-analysis March 2019

Vitamin D reduced only the systolic blood pressure in T2DM – Meta-analysis April 2019

Vitamin D receptor gene associated with 50 percent more type 2 Diabetes – meta-analyses 2013, 2016

item.title: Pairs of categories (while web page does not work)
FInd page which has attachment number
Test error in listing of recent pages
Test link with underscore
item.description:
<a href="/posts/i-use-vectomega-brand-of-omega-3-admin-of-vitamindwiki-may-2014-i-use-vectomega–of-vitamindwiki" style=“color: red; text-decoration: underline;” title=“This post/category does not exist yet: I use Vectomega brand of Omega-3 – Admin of VitaminDWiki, May 2014))

((I use Vectomega brand of Omega-3 – Admin of VitaminDWiki, May 2014))

((I use Vectomega brand of Omega-3 – Admin of VitaminDWiki, May 2014”>I use Vectomega brand of Omega-3 – Admin of VitaminDWiki, May 2014

item.title: Reasons for recent decline
item.description:
Sun ==> Skin

More people who have dark skins (4X less Vitamin D if dark skin)

More seniors (4X less Vitamin D from the sun per minute, also more clothes, outdoors less)

Outdoors less - smog,

Outdoors less - not feel comfortable outdoors (dark skin, overweight, safety)

Outdoors less - cannot see video screens in the bright noonday light

Outdoors less - avoid skin cancer

Use screen blocking before getting Vitamin D

item.description:
Some black lines to get below the 1 pill every two days module

blank line

blank line

blank line

blank line

blank line

blank line

blank line

blank line

aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

bbbbbbbbbbbbb bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb bbbbbbbbbbbbbb bbbbbbbbbbbbbbb bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb bbbbbbbbbbbbbbb bbbbbbbbbb bbbbbbbbbbbbb bbbbbbbbbbbb bbbbbbbbbbbb bbbbbbbbb

First block

aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

item.title: Strategy to increase health of many people
item.description:
Goal = improved health for most

Must not:

Be too expensive

Take too much time

Take too much effort

Exceed medical guidelines

Should:

Be easy to remember to do

Economically benefit at least one party (employer, insurance, society, individual)

Result in benefits which can be measured in less than a year

Phase 1

Document the benefits of taking 4,000 IU of vitamin D daily

Additional ways to improve health

Educate participants - individuals do not have to wait
